nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI is useful for when I'm trying to craft pitches to prospective clients, respond to client emails, or when I want to know what a contract or TOS says

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator of creative work
nodes.grounding_span: If I'm feeling really stuck and uninspired, I might use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas

nodes.label: AI as research accelerator
nodes.grounding_span: I asked for a list of styles and niches. I probably could have done my own research, but it was way faster to just get the list using AI

nodes.label: AI as threat to creative workforce
nodes.label_negative: AI as benign tool for creatives
nodes.grounding_span: If companies continue to do this, it will have a devastating effect on creatives' livelihoods

nodes.label: AI as compromise to creative integrity
nodes.grounding_span: using AI as an assist, rather than letting it do the actual core, creative work, allows me to maintain my integrity as a creative

nodes.label: Creative integrity and human artistry
nodes.grounding_span: maintain my integrity as a creative

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it was definitely a timesaver and time is money

nodes.label: Job stability and fair valuation of creative work
nodes.grounding_span: concerned about the hype surrounding AI tools and how it affects our job stability

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Having AI assist with the tedious things like emails, contracts, pitches, etc has saved me time

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I don't use Generative AI in my creative work

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: If I'm feeling really stuck and uninspired, I might use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas. But ultimately, I try to avoid AI use in my workflow

nodes.label: Concern for artists directly impacted by AI
nodes.grounding_span: If companies continue to do this, it will have a devastating effect on creatives' livelihoods

nodes.label: Boundary-setting between core and peripheral creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: using AI as an assist, rather than letting it do the actual core, creative work

nodes.label: Concern for broader industry and economic impact
nodes.grounding_span: concerned about the hype surrounding AI tools and how it affects our job stability
